meaning: adj.起晒斑的,晒黑的 vbl.sunburn过去式及过去分词
examples: He could not bear the touch of clothing on his sunburnt skin.
Being exposed to direct sunlight too much can easily get you sunburnt.
Plants can get sunburnt. Yellow spots may appear on their leaves and fruits.
Breezy waterfront resorts and sleek live-aboard dive vessels host travelling scuba enthusiasts and sunburnt Australians on holiday.
But a sunburnt Murray needed less than an hour to record a straight sets victory over Kohlschreiber to level the tie.
